output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?label ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?label) , "Army-Navy Game"))
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
